feed.title: SAP Community - API Management
feed.subtitle: API Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: API Service layer and its response code list
entry.content:
Hello partners.

I hope you are fine.

I need to find the response list that is used in the service layer api to validate responses (correct or incorrect) but I haven't found anything about it.

For example, the code -2028 is when an entity does not exist in approval process.

I hope you can help me with this information.

entry.title: SAP API Management - Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working on exposing an Integration Flow Endpoint as an API using API Management. I've followed several blogs and the tutorial "Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API." However, I am struggling to get my iFlow endpoint to work with certain policies. Could you please advise if you have a good resource or knowledge base that we can follow step-by-step to achieve this?

Here is what I have done so far:

  1. I added SAP CI as an API Provider using the service instance credentials for the "api" plan. I am using OAuth for authentication. The connection test shows as successful.
  2. My iFlow endpoint is something like https://hostname/http/permit/status. The API should handle one permit at a time and update the status using the PUT method.
  3. When I created the API Proxy, I selected the iFlow using the discover option, and all fields were automatically populated, including the Base Path.

My questions are:

  1. The API Base Path was set to /status, and I added v1 in front of it as a version number. However, I believe this should be a unique path across all APIs to avoid conflicts in the future. Can I change this path to something more meaningful, like permitstatus, considering my iFlow endpoint mentioned above? Would this help avoid conflicts with future APIs?
  2. Do I need to add any resources after this? The tutorial talks about using URL as an API provider but doesn't mention my specific case. If I add a PUT resource, what should the path prefix be? Is it "/status"? I tried using /status, but I get an HTTP 404 error when I try out the API.
  3. Additionally, while adding the proxy, the service instance credentials I used are not the same as the ones I used initially when adding CI as a provider. For the OAuth authentication, I supplied the Process Integration service plan "integration flow." When I test this provider, I get a message that indicates there is an issue. Could this discrepancy in credentials be causing problems with the proxy setup?
    • "System is up and reachable. However, the ping check responded with code : 404; Message : Not Found"
    • However, when I initially added CI as a provider and discovered the flows, the connection test was successful. I used the service plan "api" credentials here.
    • "Connection to the system was successful with response code : 200; Message : OK"
  4. I am also not sure how to check logs or traces to understand why the API test is giving a 404 error. Is there any place where I can monitor what has gone wrong? All I can find are the API analytics dashboards, which show call stats but not the reason for failure or logs. Why is there no monitoring similar to Cloud Integration here?

I feel lost amidst multiple blogs and help links, and I haven't been able to find a single place that clearly explains how to expose this endpoint with basic policies like OAuth, Allowed IPs, Exception Handling etc.

Thank you for your help and guidance.

Screenshots:

entry.title: Authenticating an API using SAML assertion in SAP API Management
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am having a requirement to authenticate the API exposed via API Management using the SAML Assertion with out using the third party like Azure. The external application does not generate the SAML Assertion. Is there any way where we can generate the assertion in API Management itself to authenticate the external Application?. From API management to SAP we can do that using SAML assertion policy . 

Please help me on this.

Regards

Giridhar

entry.title: how to use discover api - cloud integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to use an API present in the "discover api":

what are the steps to use it?

I made a copy of the api and created the proxies api

thanks

entry.title: How to update multiple PR line items using a standard API
entry.content:
Hello,

        We are using a standard PR API for creation of purchase requisition with multiple line items using AIS (Azure integration service). Now our issue is when we are trying use a patch call to update multiple line items of the PR (ex change of quantity of line item 10, 20, 30....), the 1st line is getting updated, but  when AIS is trying to update 2nd line item getting an error- "User XXX cloud connector, SBP already processing purchase Requisition XXXXX".

Is it not possible to update the multiple line items of a PR via single update patch call of the PR requisition.

Please let me know the possible way.

Link to standard API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001/overview

 

Regards

Venu

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite API Management and Stage Relevant Configuration Parameters
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are running multiple sub-accounts (CF) representing different enviroments (dev/test/preprod/prod). Artefacts are transported via CTM. Now i'm facing the challenge that we have artefacts from the API Management (Proxy / Products) which contain relevant configuration per each stage. Both in the Custom Attributes of the Proxy, aswell as in the proxy policy aswell.

For example: Service Callouts to different hosts. Having boolean flags to control the proxy flow.

Right now when the artefact is transported we need to manually adapt these kind of configuration, which might be a bit too error-prone. As we need to do it for each transport from each stage.

Is there a more convenient out of the box way to pass some external configuration besides the transport itsellf. Just like having it with CPI Artefacts and MTA extensions?

I'm open for any help 🙂

 

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: SAP user id for api_sales_order_simulation_srv
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP S/4 Hana on premise edition. I would like to understand where I can maintain linkage between the API call and background user id.

api_sales_order_simulation_srv is synchronous call from postman we can use the OAUTH 2.0 but in SAP it needs to create a sales order without saving, for this we need a SAP user ID. Is my understanding correct? If so where can I maintain the linkage?

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Dynamically calling of key value mapping in Access Control Policy in SAP API Management
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement where I need to restrict the IP Address using Access Control Policy in SAP API Management. I am able to do this by hard coding the values. But I need to do it dynamically using the key value mapping in API Management. Can anybody please help me with the steps about how to achieve this.

Regards

Giridhar.

entry.title: How do I create an API in java
entry.content: I am developing an app using Java as a language and SQLServer as a database so I would like to know if it is possible and how to create an #API to integrate another app like Finance app into my application?

entry.title: Basic auth in API Manager: client + user
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to set up the basic authentication in the API Management. I need it to check both the username&password + the cliend_id&client_secret passed on by the caller. If the user or the client_id is missing, the auth must fail. I managed to get them work but not together.

How is this possible to achieve in the API Management?

Cristian

entry.title: Cloud platform connectivity policy template not getting applied
entry.content:
i was doing the learning journey " Expose Integration Flow Endpoint as API and Test the Flow", i noticed the policy template "Cloud_Platform_Connectivity" is not getting applied. I am able to find the template and click on apply, however its not getting applied to the API.

I checked the roles, and ran the boosters again - all came out clean. 
I tried another policy template and noticed that its getting applied, issue is only with the template above "Cloud_Platform_Connectivity".
I also removed all chrome extensions as some other post had mentioned issues with caching and browser extensions- did not help, other browsers also did not work for this policy, which is very weird.
If other policies are being applied then this should also work - logically speaking, but its not !

entry.title: Unable to fetch Purchase Order Item Note details via standard API
entry.content:
Hello All,

             I am using standard purchase API get call to fetch the Purchase Order details and send the details to 3rd party system. The problem being faced is, we are unable to fetch the purchase order item note details via the standard API. 

I am using the standard API: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_PURCHASEORDER_0001/path/get_PurchaseOrderItemNote__PurchaseOrder___PurchaseOrderItem___TextObjectType___Language_

& the input values are PO number:457XXXX, item no:00010, Text object type: F07  language: EN.

 

Is there any point which needs to be specified, for the item note details to be pulled via the standard API

I am getting the below error:
<Text>Unknown http error occurred in the context of Data Services</Text>


-<Source>

<Program>/IWBEP/CL_OD_UTILS============CP</Program>

<Include>/IWBEP/CL_OD_UTILS============CM00E</Include>

<Line>7</Line>

</Source>

</_-IWCOR_-CX_OD_HTTP_ERROR>


-<CX_SADL_GW_V4_NOT_FOUND>

<Text>Resource not found for segment 'A_PURCHASEORDERITEM_2'</Text>


-<Attributes>

<HTTP_STATUS_CODE>404</HTTP_STATUS_CODE>

<NAME>A_PURCHASEORDERITEM_2</NAME>

<SAP_NOTE_ID>0000000000</SAP_NOTE_ID>

</Attributes>


-<Source>

<Program>CL_SADL_GW_V4_DPC_ADP_EXC_CONVCP</Program>

<Include>CL_SADL_GW_V4_DPC_ADP_EXC_CONVCM007</Include>

<Line>8</Line>

</Source>

</CX_SADL_GW_V4_NOT_FOUND>


-<CX_SADL_CONTRACT_VIOLATION>

<Text>Resource not found for entity 'A_PURCHASEORDERITEM_2'</Text>

API
-<Attributes>

<LIMIT>0</LIMIT>

<NAME>A_PURCHASEORDERITEM_2</NAME>

entry.title: Sending Log data from SAP API Mgmt to SAP Application Logging Service
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm trying to get more transparency and observability in our API Mgmt. I try to use the log message policy according to this reference: Part 7 – API Security Best Practices – Log all API... - SAP Community.

I cannot find any reference if this even possible as due to BTP's Nature you should bind applications to the ALS Service which is not possible as the API Mgmt is an "embedded" app inside the Integration Suite.

 

Help is most welcome,

Thanks

Alex

entry.title: In API Proxy, can I change All HTTP method to 'HEAD' before forwarding to Target Endpoint?
entry.content:
Hi,

I use API Proxy in Integration Suite, and here is what I try to implement:

I want to check health status of this API(to confirm if it is available):
https://cpi-mmt-dev.it-cpi018-rt.cfapps.eu10-003.hana.ondemand.com/http/** (all path under /http/.*, like /http/operation/error_iflows)
so I only need to call it with HTTP HEAD method - I don't need any payload since I only need to know if it returns 200.

I create a API Proxy URL: https://maco-dev.test.apimanagement.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/health.

 

No matter what HTTP method(GET, POST, ...) calls this Proxy URL, the Proxy Endpoint will forward this request to Target Endpoint with method HEAD. I.e, all request from client will be replaced with HTTP method 'HEAD'.

I tried to achieve by setting values of request.method in javascript:

I tried three ways:

However, even if method set to 'HEAD'(use `request.method='HEAD'`, another two ways above can't change), the Target Endpoint still return 200 but with payload:

 

Is there ideas for this topic? thanks in advance!😆

entry.title: How the data will comes from SAP Data sphere to SAP SCT?
entry.content:
Hey Folks, Greetings!

i.How the data is coming from SAP Data sphere to SAP SCT?

ii.How the data is coming from EM to Datasphere?

ii. Where we can store the SCT data's? Suppose, If is it SAP Datasphere mean How?

Pls Advise

Thanks

Tam

entry.title: SAP Services to find the details of company code and Bank Account related to the company Code
entry.content:
I have been looking for severals services in SAP but not finding the one i was looking for.

I need the details of a company Code: Bankkonto, bankcode and so on.

This API was not helpful

entry.title: how to get Organization Secret and User Secret to configuration API provider?
entry.content:
I am trying to configure API provider but I do not know how to get 

  • Organization Secret
  • User Secret

I researched but that solution was old version.

entry.title: Error while calling SAP API Proxy connected to SAP Gateway service
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The client/consumer of our SAP API Proxy is facing the below issue while calling it.
FYI, API Proxy is connected to backend OData gateway service via API provider. While doing the $metadata call to the SAP gateway, it responded with below error to SAP API M. But after 4 hours the service was back and we see successful message.
But since this is an intermittent issue, we wanted to understand the root cause of the failure. Also where do we get the error logs in SAP gateway for GET $metadata calls that are failed.

Error:

{
  "fault": {
    "faultstring": "Unexpected EOF at target",
    "detail": {
      "errorcode": "messaging.adaptors.http.flow.UnexpectedEOFAtTarget"
    }
  }

Thanks,

Jovita

entry.title: Looking for an S4 Odata V2 contains below Shipment fileds post Invoicing
entry.content:
I am looking for a standard Odata caters below fileds for OData  SAP Transportation Management #implimentation and API call. Is there any standard API available which I can ut

 

Delivery Order No
Shipment No
Transport Planning Point
Shipment Route
Shipping Type (etc truck, air…)
Container ID
External ID 1
Forwarding Agent
Transporter Name
Search Terms 1
Search Terms 2
Street / House Number
Street 4
Postal Code
City
Country
Region
Timezone
Language
Telephone
Email

 

 

 

 

s4Hana Onpermise

Odata V2

 

Regards

Jakku

entry.title: API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV doesn't have Warehouse Number
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our Client were using SOAP API earlier, but now they have moved to ODATA V2 API and activated this service.

Warehouse Number is not reflecting in any of the nodes.

Is there a connected note to implement

Regards

Nitin Desai
